name: Dark Willow
description: Let's have some fun, shall we? Mireska Sunbreeze, the Dark Willow Attacking no longer takes Dark Willow out of Shadow Realm. Each attack now applies the bonus spell damage corresponding to the buff duration.

abilities.name: Pixie Dust
abilities.description: Grants a bonus factor to all health regeneration and mana regeneration sources applied to Mireska. The bonus factor increases while Mireska is being affected by untargetable and hidden sources.

abilities.name: Bramble Maze
abilities.description: Creates a maze of brambles that grow in the area-targeted location after a short delay. Enemy units coming in contact with a matured bramble are rooted and take damage over time.

abilities.name: Shadow Realm
abilities.description: Grants Mireska an enemy incoming damage amplification aura centered around her. The longer the, the potent the amplification.

abilities.name: Cursed Crown
abilities.description: Creates brambles around the affected enemy unit when the effect delay ends. Additionally, the full ability effect is applied even if the debuff is dispelled before the delay ends. Reduces cooldown. Also accumulates a portion of Mireska's allied heroes' attack damage dealt to the cursed enemy unit.

abilities.name: Bedlam
abilities.description: Although visually Jex damages its target, the spell damage applied is sourced to Mireska. The wisp starts at Mireska's west side, and orbits clockwise. This unit does not feel the effects from any damage sources. It cannot be targeted by attacks or abilities and have its health bar temporarily hidden.

abilities.name: Terrorize
abilities.description: This unit is uncontrollable. Mireska's Jex-based abilities itself do not grant vision. However, Jex does as a unit. This unit does not feel the effects from any damage sources. It cannot be targeted by attacks or abilities and have its health bar temporarily hidden.
